channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: J&K Police Attach Property of Proclaimed Terror Offender in Rajouri
item.description: In a recent development in Rajouri district, Jammu & Kashmir, local police have attached immovable property belonging to Shafeeq Ahmed, who has been declared a proclaimed offender in a terror-related ...

item.title: Hamilton youth rescued after falling through ice near Pier 7
item.description: On March 7, 2026, two youths fell through ice near the Pier 7 boardwalk in Hamilton, Ontario. Despite warnings from bystanders, they ventured onto unsafe ice near Williams Fresh Cafe. When the ice gav...

item.title: Democrats Target Latino Voters in Key Primary Races Across Swing Districts
item.description: Democrats are increasingly focusing on Latino voters following record turnout in recent primaries, particularly highlighted by James Talarico's strong performance in Texas. This surge has prompted cam...

item.title: Manchester United Keeper Senne Lammens Requests No Discussion of Clean Sheets Before Matches
item.description: Manchester United's new goalkeeper, Senne Lammens, has quickly become a fan favourite this season due to his reliable performances. The 23-year-old Belgian stopper, who joined from Royal Antwerp, has ...

item.title: Remembering Dean Joey Hofileña: Life Lessons of Grace and Purpose
item.description: Dean Jose Maria 'Joey' Hofileña, former Ateneo Law School Dean, passed away on February 26, leaving behind a life remembered for its grace, kindness, and dedication. Known for his calm and easy-going ...

item.title: South Africa Central Bank Reviews Risk Plans Amid Rising Oil Prices from Middle East Tensions
item.description: South Africa's central bank is planning to update its risk scenarios for the upcoming interest rate decision on March 26, 2026, after the recent Middle East tensions caused by Israel and Washington bo...

item.title: How to Tell the Difference Between Healthy Boundaries and Manipulation
item.description: This article talks about how sometimes people confuse healthy boundaries with manipulation in their relationships. Setting boundaries is very important because it protects you from situations or peopl...

item.title: Celtic and Rangers fans clash on pitch after Scottish Cup match at Ibrox
item.description: During an Old Firm match at Ibrox Stadium, tensions flared as Celtic fans entered the pitch to celebrate a 4-2 victory on penalties, leading to a confrontation with Rangers supporters. The initial cel...

item.title: Support Base Uncertainty Poses Challenge for Iran’s Successor
item.description: Iran faces an unprecedented moment following the death of Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei from US and Israeli strikes. His potential successor, his hardline son Mojtaba Khamenei, may struggle to...

item.title: Reserve Bank updates limits for cross-border transfers and foreign investments
item.description: The South African Reserve Bank (SARB) has released nine draft circulars for public comment, implementing measures announced in last month's Budget Review. The changes aim to increase limits for cross-...

item.title: Lebanese man displaced again after rebuilding home damaged in previous conflict
item.description: Hussain Khrais, a 66-year-old man from Khiyam in south Lebanon, has been forced to flee his hometown once more due to renewed conflict between Israel and Hezbollah. Just months ago, he had spent aroun...

item.title: Opposition in Nagaland and Meghalaya Grows Against Mandate to Sing Full Vande Mataram
item.description: The directive from the Union Home Ministry mandating the singing of the full six-stanza version of Vande Mataram before the national anthem at official functions and educational institutions has trigg...

item.title: Startup Launches $70M Initiative to Automate Manufacturing Using AI
item.description: Bob McGrew, the former chief research officer at OpenAI and early Palantir employee, has co-founded a new startup called Arda, which has successfully raised $70 million at a valuation of $700 million....

item.title: Oscar Piastri accepts responsibility after crash prevents him starting Australian Grand Prix
item.description: Australian Formula One driver Oscar Piastri has taken full responsibility for a crash during the reconnaissance lap that prevented him from starting his home Grand Prix at Albert Park. The incident oc...

item.title: Opposition Tables No-Confidence Motion Against Speaker Om Birla: Numbers and Political Strategy
item.description: The opposition in India has moved a no-confidence motion against Lok Sabha Speaker Om Birla, reflecting heightened political tensions in Parliament. While the motion itself is largely symbolic given t...

item.title: Government Coordinates Response as Floods Displace 50,000 Kenyans
item.description: Public Service Cabinet Secretary Justin Ruku has revealed that heavy rains have displaced about 50,000 people across Kenya. Speaking during a press briefing, CS Ruku said mafuriko have affected many c...

item.title: Flavour Warns Men to Avoid Pursuing Married Women, Citing 'Oringo' as a Destructive Force
item.description: Popular Nigerian highlife and Afrobeats singer Flavour recently took to X to drop a strong advice for men wey dey eye another man wife. Him write say 'Agu! pray against oringo wey go carry you to dey ...

item.title: Individual passes away outside Glasgow’s inaugural supervised drug consumption facility
item.description: A man has tragically died outside The Thistle, the UK’s first legal drug consumption facility, located on Hunter Street in Glasgow. The incident occurred on Sunday morning at approximately 10:20. Poli...

item.title: Why a Single Retirement Savings Target Doesn’t Fit Every Canadian
item.description: A recent BMO survey found that Canadians believe they need an average of $1.7 million to retire comfortably. Financial experts, however, argue that this figure is not particularly meaningful. Moira Ro...

item.title: Supreme Court Introduces Four-Day Onsite Work Week to Conserve Energy
item.description: Starting March 9, 2026, the Supreme Court of the Philippines will implement a four-day onsite work week with one day of work-from-home (WFH) for its employees. This measure is part of efforts to conse...
